findings.evidence: Line 17 states the claim; `rg -n "instance |def |theorem |structure " TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Isotopy.lean` shows only `Isotopy`, `Isotopic`, and `AmbientIsotopy` APIs, with no knot-equivalence declaration.
findings.fix: Reword this as intended future use or roadmap motivation, e.g. that this continuous relation is meant to be specialized later, rather than saying knot equivalence already is that restriction.
findings.issue: The module docstring says knot equivalence is the restriction of `TauCeti.Isotopic` to smooth embeddings `S¹ ↪ M`, but this file only defines continuous `Isotopic`/`AmbientIsotopy` and contains no knot-equivalence specialization.

summary: The main declarations are documented, but the module docstring overstates what this file establishes by presenting future knot-equivalence specialization as a current fact.
